meta.title: Chmurnik wordmark exploration
meta.anchor: Polish cloud and atmosphere atlas for beginners through expert aviation study
meta.summary: A romantic Polish name paired with a rigorous educational descriptor.

preserve: massive modular letters with negative-space cuts
avoid: copying the Zgrywa wordmark or Z symbol

routes.label: Constructed Chmurnik
routes.rationale: The short Polish name supports a bold custom silhouette while the descriptor keeps the expert category explicit.
routes.best_for: A distinctive cultural identity that can sit beside Romie and Roobert without competing with them.
routes.decision_advice: Use this direction if the product should feel like a field atlas with folklore in its name and scientific discipline in its content.
routes.watch_out: The name and generated letter construction still require formal trademark review and production vectorization.
routes.next_step: Redraw the selected wordmark as controlled vector paths and test favicon and monochrome variants.
